summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs were kept independent for normal maintainer review; unavailable refs were blocked on missing live state; one unavailable PR with API-key persistence signal was routed to central security handling.
